description: P1 features for Stupid Soccer: match results, daily challenges, leaderboards, share feature, async PvP, and Stripe subscriptions. Core gameplay, packs, and marketplace already implemented.

userStories.title: Match Results API Endpoint
userStories.description: Create API endpoint to save match results after Phaser game ends. Endpoint receives difficulty, user score, AI score, and squad snapshot.
acceptanceCriteria: Accepts JSON body with difficulty, userScore, aiScore, squadSnapshot
Returns matchId and coinsEarned in response

userStories.title: Coin Rewards Calculation
userStories.description: Calculate and award coins based on match outcome: Win=25, Draw=10, Loss=5, plus 5 per goal scored.
acceptanceCriteria: coins_earned calculated correctly in match save API
Additional +5 coins per user goal scored

userStories.title: Phaser Match End Event
userStories.description: Emit match result event from Phaser game when timer ends, triggering API call to save results.
acceptanceCriteria: MainScene emits 'matchEnd' event with scores when timer reaches 0
Verify in browser: match end triggers save

userStories.title: Match Results Screen
userStories.description: Display results overlay after match ends showing score, coins earned, and navigation options.
acceptanceCriteria: Results overlay appears over Phaser canvas after match
Shows coins earned with breakdown (base + goals)
Verify in browser: results screen displays correctly

userStories.title: Profile Stats - Wins/Losses Tracking
userStories.description: Track total wins, losses, draws, and goals on user profile.
acceptanceCriteria: profiles table has total_wins, total_losses, total_draws, total_goals columns
Match save API updates these counters

userStories.title: Daily Challenges Database Schema
userStories.description: Create tables for challenge definitions and user progress tracking.
acceptanceCriteria: challenges table exists with id, type, target, reward_coins, reward_pack_type columns
user_daily_challenges table exists with user_id, challenge_id, progress, completed_at, assigned_at columns
RLS policies allow users to read/update own challenges
Seed data includes challenge types: win_matches, open_packs, score_goals, trade_player, use_scout

userStories.title: Daily Challenge Assignment
userStories.description: Assign 3 random challenges to users daily at midnight UTC or on first login.
acceptanceCriteria: Function assigns 3 random challenges from pool
Challenges assigned on user's first visit of the day
Previous incomplete challenges cleared at midnight UTC

userStories.title: Daily Challenges Page UI
userStories.description: Create page showing user's daily challenges with progress indicators.
acceptanceCriteria: Each challenge shows: description, progress (e.g., 1/2), reward
Completed challenges show checkmark and 'Claim' button
Verify in browser: challenges page renders correctly

userStories.title: Challenge Progress Tracking
userStories.description: Update challenge progress when user completes relevant actions (wins, packs, etc.).
acceptanceCriteria: Progress updates in real-time on challenges page

userStories.title: Challenge Reward Claiming
userStories.description: Allow users to claim rewards when challenge is complete.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking awards coins to user's profile
If reward includes pack, pack added to inventory
Challenge marked as claimed (cannot claim twice)
Verify in browser: claiming works correctly

userStories.title: Leaderboards Database Schema
userStories.description: Create leaderboard_entries table for cached rankings.
acceptanceCriteria: leaderboard_entries table with user_id, leaderboard_type, score, rank, period columns
leaderboard_type supports: wins, goals, coins, pvp

userStories.title: Leaderboards Page UI
userStories.description: Create page showing top players by various metrics.
acceptanceCriteria: Tabs for different leaderboard types (Wins, Goals, Coins)
Shows rank, username, score for top 100
Verify in browser: leaderboard displays correctly

userStories.title: Leaderboard Rank Calculation
userStories.description: Calculate and cache leaderboard rankings periodically.
acceptanceCriteria: Database function calculates ranks from profiles/matches data
Ranks updated on relevant actions or via scheduled job
Ties handled consistently (same rank, skip next)

userStories.title: Share Card Component
userStories.description: Create shareable player card component optimized for social media.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows player sprite, name, stats, rarity, backstory snippet
Verify in browser: card looks good at share dimensions

userStories.title: Share Image Generation
userStories.description: Generate PNG image from ShareCard using html2canvas.
acceptanceCriteria: html2canvas converts ShareCard to PNG blob
Image quality suitable for social sharing

userStories.title: Share Buttons Integration
userStories.description: Add share buttons for Twitter, Discord, and download.
acceptanceCriteria: Share button on PlayerCard and after pack opening
Twitter button opens tweet composer with image and text
Download button saves PNG to device
Copy link button copies shareable URL
Verify in browser: sharing works on desktop and mobile

userStories.title: Async PvP Database Schema
userStories.description: Create tables for PvP leagues, entries, and matches.
acceptanceCriteria: pvp_leagues table with season_number, starts_at, ends_at, is_active
pvp_entries table with league_id, user_id, squad_snapshot, wins, losses, points, rank
pvp_matches table with league_id, player1_id, player2_id, scores, simulated_at

userStories.title: PvP League Join Flow
userStories.description: Allow users to join the current weekly league with their squad.
acceptanceCriteria: 'Join League' button visible if not already joined
Cannot join if already in current league
Verify in browser: can join league

userStories.title: PvP Match Simulation Logic
userStories.description: Implement stat-based match simulation for async PvP.
acceptanceCriteria: Team power calculated from squad stats
Simulation is deterministic given same seed

userStories.title: PvP Daily Simulation Cron
userStories.description: Run daily simulations matching league participants.
acceptanceCriteria: Supabase Edge Function or cron job runs daily
Each entry plays 1-2 matches per day against random opponents

userStories.title: PvP Results and Rankings UI
userStories.description: Show league standings and match results.
acceptanceCriteria: PvP page shows current league standings
User's rank and points displayed prominently
Can view opponent squad for each match
Verify in browser: standings display correctly

userStories.title: PvP Weekly Rewards
userStories.description: Award coins to top players at end of league week.
acceptanceCriteria: Users notified of reward on next login

userStories.title: Stripe Integration Setup
userStories.description: Configure Stripe for subscription payments.
acceptanceCriteria: Environment variables for STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET
Product and Price created in Stripe for Manager Club ($5/month)

userStories.title: Stripe Checkout Session
userStories.description: Create checkout session for Manager Club subscription.
acceptanceCriteria: Redirects user to Stripe hosted checkout

userStories.title: Stripe Webhook Handler
userStories.description: Handle Stripe webhooks for subscription lifecycle events.

userStories.title: Manager Club Subscription Page
userStories.description: Create page to upgrade to Manager Club subscription.
acceptanceCriteria: Lists: Unlimited AI Scout, Unlimited Trades, Badge, No Ads
If already subscribed, shows billing portal link
Verify in browser: subscription flow works end-to-end

userStories.title: Manager Club Badge Display
userStories.description: Show Manager Club badge on subscriber profiles.
acceptanceCriteria: Badge icon displayed next to username in nav
Verify in browser: badge visible for subscribers

userStories.title: Marketplace 5% Fee
userStories.description: Deduct 5% fee from marketplace sales.
acceptanceCriteria: When player is sold, seller receives 95% of sale price
userStories.notes: Fee calculated using Math.floor(price * 0.05), shown in confirm dialog

userStories.title: Navigation Update for New Pages
userStories.description: Add Challenges, Leaderboard, and PvP to navigation.
userStories.notes: Header component updated with PvP link, layout now includes Header globally

userStories.title: Streak Bonus for Daily Challenges
userStories.description: Award bonus coins for completing challenges on consecutive days.
acceptanceCriteria: Streak incremented when all 3 daily challenges completed
Bonus: +10 coins per streak day (capped at +50)
